triggeredBy.failedSourceName: Continuous Delivery Reliable Software Releases Through Build, Test, and Deployment Automation ) (Farley, DavidHumble, Jez).epub
triggeredBy.failure: book-scoped durable YAML rename ENOENT surfaced from resume-book child process as unknown stop_until_fixed

r1RequiredDesignActions: add subprocess durable failure envelope contract
make BatchCommandCheck the first-hop durable evidence carrier
define parent runner typed-envelope parsing precedence
add fail-closed rule for missing or partial subprocess evidence
add book-scoped YAML resume-child rename ENOENT acceptance cases
r2Focus: book-scoped YAML resume-child rename ENOENT acceptance cases
r2RequiredDesignActions: add failedSyscall and errno to rename ENOENT event required fields
define per-entry status-json durable failure fields
add failedSyscall, errno, renameCause and completedPublishRule to recovery summary fields
define fallback localFailureClass and unavailable evidence sentinels for incomplete subprocess envelopes
strengthen book-scoped resume-child acceptance evidence across all observation surfaces
r3Focus: event required fields include failedSyscall and errno for rename ENOENT
status-json durable failure entries preserve envelope fields
recovery summary fields preserve ENOENT root-cause evidence
incomplete subprocess envelope has fail-closed localFailureClass and sentinel fields
book-scoped resume-child acceptance covers all observation surfaces
r3RequiredDesignActions: add failedSyscall, errno and targetMappingOwner to eventSchema conditional fields
r4Focus: eventSchema conditional fields close durableFailureEventEvidence requirements
r4RequiredDesignActions: add cleanupReason, checksumRecoveryDecision, evidenceIncomplete, evidenceIncompleteReason, unavailableFieldSentinels and sidecar fields to eventSchema
add incomplete envelope fields to durableFailureEventEvidence
add lane, targetMappingOwner and leaseGeneration to commandCheckDurableEvidence required fields
add retryable, lane, targetMappingOwner, itemId, bookId, workerId, leaseGeneration and incomplete envelope fields to recoverySummaryRequiredFields
r5Focus: schema field closure across event, commandCheck, status-json and recovery summary
no unimplemented design gap remains before development

r2RequiredImplementationActions: fail closed missing durable subprocess envelopes for confirmed durable local state failures
add malformed and missing envelope regression coverage
make runner-start preflight scan temps and item-derived book-scoped targetMapping scopes
add runner-start book-scoped YAML temp regression coverage
add settings projection first-missing managed creation regression coverage
r3RequiredImplementationActions: stabilize envelope fail-closed tests with explicit subprocess cleanup or higher deterministic timeout
separate checksum meta missing, invalid and conflict states in shared durable store
quarantine invalid or conflicting checksum meta sidecars without moving primary targets
add sidecar-only checksum meta invalid and conflict regression coverage
r4RequiredImplementationActions: add full checksum sidecar repair evidence to checksum meta writer and rename ENOENT paths
include checksumExpected, checksumActual, checksumRecoveryDecision and repairAllowed in runner and shared durable store sidecar write evidence
add checksum meta conflict regression coverage
assert sidecar rename ENOENT projection preserves checksum and repair fields
stabilize real child book-scoped YAML rename ENOENT tests and subprocess cleanup
align settings projection rejection summary activeCommand assertion with resume-book boundary
stabilize status-json repair-writer regression tests or split their timeout budget
r5RequiredImplementationActions: add runner-level SIGTERM and SIGINT cleanup for active subprocess groups
preserve no-orphan timeout behavior when test helpers stop the batch runner
add durable payload schema-closure regression for command checks, checkpoints, events, manifests and recovery summaries
r6Focus: verify R5 signal cleanup and durable schema-closure fixes against fixed criteria
confirm implementation audit can pass before real EPUB runner resumes

realRunner.reason: implementation audit r6 passed; resume real EPUB runner

closureReason: design and implementation audits passed; directory was left with __open suffix
